name: Delta State University Wyatt Gym
description:
Delta State University has open gym for students and community persons who possess a DSU Okra Recreation Card. Call the DSU switchboard to be connected to admissions for the cost of an Okra Card or the Wyatt Gym for more information on court availability.

Join the Cleveland Pickleball club on Team Read at ClevelandMS61 to see when we will play at the Wyatt Gym on Delta State University campus. Okra Card is still required.
open_play_schedule: They gym is open most days that DSU is in session. There are youth camps taking place during June. Availability may vary depending on other campus activities requiring the gym.
fees: Members only — Call 1-800-GO TO DSU or 662-846-3000 for more information. Ask for Admissions for the price of access to recreation facilities OR Wyatt Gym for court availability and more information.
